title: jinjer-corpus-analysis
description: Computational analysis pipeline for the lyrical corpus of the Ukrainian metal band Jinjer (2012-2025). Implements three layers of distant reading: lemma frequency analysis with spaCy, KWIC concordance with thematic dictionaries, and dependency parsing for syntactic role analysis. Supplementary materials for the article 'Beyond Female-Fronted: Allegorical Agency and Symbolic Vacancy in Jinjer's Lyrical Corpus (2012-2025)' under double-anonymised review at Humanities and Social Sciences Communications.
_comment_creators: Author identity is left as placeholder during double-anonymised peer review. ORCID will be added upon acceptance.
